description_long: This is a two-story modern cafe building with a flat roof and a prominent 'Coffee' sign on top. The facade features large rectangular windows on both floors, and the entrance is marked by a single door with a small golden handle. The upper floor has an outdoor seating area with round tables and orange chairs, protected by a yellow-and-gray striped awning. The lower floor also has a similar outdoor seating arrangement, enclosed by a simple railing. The structure is primarily composed of dark brown materials, with metallic railings and accents, and the overall design is clean and geometric.
description: A modern two-story cafe with large windows, outdoor seating on both levels, and a bold 'Coffee' sign on the roof.
description_view_0: Side view showing the flat roof, striped awning, and the layered structure of the building.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the 'Coffee' sign, main entrance, large windows, and both levels of outdoor seating.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the outdoor seating areas on both floors and the striped awning above.
description_view_3: Side view with a clear look at the awning, upper and lower outdoor seating, and the back wall of the cafe.
